text:
is an Evangelion introduced in the Evangelion: Another Impact (Confidential) short. Its pilot is unknown as it becomes berserk soon after the beginning of the test of the unit.

Profile

Official name:
It is an Evangelion built in complete secrecy. Every detail about its purpose and its specifics is unknown.

Unit-Null's armor is very reminiscent of the Unit-01's. The structure of the armor, same for the helmet, is almost identical. The eyes section are covered and equipped with sensors: Horn-like sensors extend from the top and bottom to pick up sound. 目は、塞がれてセンサーがついています。 音を拾うため、上下に角の様なセンサーが伸びています。(ある種耳の役割を果たします) In the settei, there are no visible eyes under the helmet, hinting that it is a blind Evangelion, interacting via sound. The mouth piece is an arrangement of sharp teeth which are still visible while the mouth is closed. The overall color scheme of the EVA is a very dark purple with orange details as well as glowing blue details all over the body. 

Unit-Null possesses a sonic roar, capable of destroying a dozen or so VTOL Aircraft at a range of several hundred meters.

It has a hidden blade stored in his elbow. The blade is a heat blade made of an unknown material that does not lose its sharpness even when it emits high heat. 肘に暗器のブレードを収納してあり、ブレードはヒートブレードで高熱を放っても切れ味の落ちない未知の素材。 

History

Evangelion: Another Impact (Confidential)

The unit is undergoing an activation test, when it suddenly goes berserk. The unit somehow launches itself from the underground base.

It starts stumbling around whilst clutching its head in a desolate city, presumably Tokyo-3, before being attacked by the military. Upon destroying its attackers, it hears the voice of a girl. It starts running across the city towards the voice, finally crashing through a building, causing it to collapse on top of the Eva. Rising from the debris, the girl appears to be in its hand, staring up at it with eyes of red. It howls at the sky as the camera shows the audience a near-completely submerged and destroyed world. The crater the Eva is in rapidly fills with water.

Trivia

The mechanic designer is Atsushi Takeuchi and it was modeled by Tomohiro Shimizu on ZBrush. https://web.archive.org/web/20160517213106/https://cgworld.jp/feature/201605-cgw213t1-eva.html (Archived) 
It made the debut in Pachinko machines in Neon Genesis Evangelion ~Roar to the Future~ on 20 December 2021.
The Unit Null's roars are stock sound effects, notably the 1976's ' roars.
The Evangelion at no point has an umbilical cable attached to its back, suggesting an alternate power source.
